title: Easy Protoceratops Coloring Page

author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Unlike its later relative Triceratops, Protoceratops lacked well-developed horns, possessing only a small bony neck frill.
Designed for Easy difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing smooth gradient shading using dual-brush markers.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about marine habitats and ocean conservation while developing fine motor coordination.
